common_assumptions: file location known without prior grep/search
return type inferred from function name without reading definition
structural authority claim made without file:line citation
helper/utility exists where semantically expected without verification
configuration format or schema assumed from pattern-matching alone
strength_patterns: methodical diagnostic iteration: running commands, reading output, adjusting next step based on result
multi-file context assembly before editing to understand coupling across components
git-aware operations with pre-push status+diff+log verification before risky ops
weakness_patterns: edit-heavy loops without root-cause diagnosis: same file edited 5+ times when a single dependency read would clarify
assumption-driven implementation: jumping to edits based on expected structure rather than reading actual schema first
re-edit thrashing under overconfidence: initial approach confidently wrong, requiring 10+ correction rounds
